content.en:
Water Lin Domain.

Curling Battlegrounds.

This was once the battlefield of several ultimate powerhouses, and there were even extreme powerhouses who fell here, coupled with the particularity of this place, a special relic was gradually formed.

At this time, there are still some remnants of the power of the ultimate powerhouse in this battlefield, so this battlefield is still very dangerous.

Ye Tian was in a hurry for a long time, and only then did he arrive at the Shuilin Domain.

The Water Lin Domain is very far away from the Xuantian Domain, and there are hundreds of domains in between, and it was also an accident that allowed the Xuantian Pavilion to learn the information here.

After coming to the curling field.

Ye Tian felt the extreme chill, and everything here was frozen by a terrifying divine power.

He stepped into the curling battlefield step by step, and soon sensed a trace, which was caused by a killer move by an ultimate powerhouse.

And he also sensed that "Nine Eighty" was another eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse, and the other party also felt traces here, and seemed to have the same intention as him.

Ye Tian didn't bother the other party, picked another position, and silently contemplated here.

Time passes.

After a long period of time, Ye Tian continued to look for other traces, and soon found another trace, and continued to comprehend the attack of the Ultimate Extreme Strongman.

In this way, Ye Tian walked on the curling battlefield and felt the traces of the battle of the ultimate powerhouse.

Gradually, he comprehended a lot of things and gained more and more.

this day.

In the depths of the curling battlefield, Ye Tian saw the remnants of an attack, even he didn't dare to approach, otherwise he would definitely be killed.

"The power of this blow should be some kind of means that is extremely close to the ultimate dimensional killing move!"

Ye Tian said with a sigh.

Immediately, he continued to meditate here, and this time the enlightenment was even more rewarding.

In this way, Ye Tian has been here for a long time.

There are some other places in the curling battlefield, such as the place where the blood of the ultimate powerhouse is transformed, Ye Tian has been enlightened for a while, but there is not much gain, so he does not continue to comprehend.

After that, Ye Tian left the curling battlefield and returned to Tianwei Pavilion, and then began to sort out the harvest, continued to perfect the Golden Arm Kill, and also created another amazing killing move, Aurora Escape, with a speed beyond the limit and combined with the Golden Arm Kill, it was enough to bombard any enemy.

After tens of thousands of years, Ye Tian continued to cultivate, and finally reached the seventeen-dimensional realm, and at the same time cultivated many fourteen-dimensional and fifteen-dimensional powerhouses, so that Tianwei Pavilion truly became the first in the Xuantian Domain.

Even if he wasn't in the Xuantian Domain, Tianwei Pavilion was still a giant existence, and no force dared to offend Tianwei Pavilion in Xuantian Domain.

......

"The realm of the seventeenth dimension, combined with the two major killing moves of Golden Arm Kill and Aurora Escape that have been deduced to the extreme, my strength is almost invincible under the ultimate powerhouse!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But he still didn't see the hope of creating the ultimate dimensional killing move, and it was really too difficult to create the ultimate dimensional killing move.

However, he had other gains, and that was that as his strength grew, the suppressed copying talent was alleviated.

For example, he can now cover a range of hundreds of meters with his copy talent, spy on the talent, and even copy the opponent's divine talent without touching.

And.

He felt that he only needed to improve his cultivation and reach the eighteenth-dimensional realm, and he could also play more functions by copying his talent, such as the fusion upgrade function.

Therefore, he has been working hard to cultivate and use the secret method of Tianwei to absorb the power of Shenwei to refine his body.

Today's Tianwei secret method has been perfected by him countless times, and it is already one of the top Shenwei secret methods in the Shenwei world.

......

Celestial Domain.

Tianqi Mountain.

The power of the divine dimension here is extremely rich, and it is one of the top treasures of the Heavenly Art Domain, if you cultivate here, you can absorb more of the power of the divine dimension, and the cultivation will improve quickly.

However, this place is occupied by a powerful force, and even ordinary powerhouses of the Eighth Dimensional Realm dare not break into this place.

However.

this day.

A figure came across the void, wanting to enter the Heavenly Qi Mountain to cultivate.

Whew!!!

Six eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses appeared one after another and intercepted the comer.

When Ye Tianda heard about the special nature of Tianqi Mountain, he was ready to enter here to cultivate, which would allow him to break through to the eighteenth-dimensional realm faster.

As for the Hengyuan Gate that occupied Tianqi Mountain, he didn't care about it at all.

Hengyuanmen is indeed very powerful, with dozens of powerhouses in the eighteenth dimension, but there is no ultimate powerhouse......

Therefore, he is not afraid of Hengyuan Gate at all.

"Everyone, I only need to cultivate in Hengyuan Gate for a period of time before leaving!" Ye Tian said.

"Look for death!"

These six eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses were furious, and one of the eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses directly attacked and killed Ye Tian.

In the other party's opinion, the eighteenth dimension attacking the seventeenth dimension is not a casual thing?

However, he far underestimated Ye Tian's strength.

"Golden Arm Kill!"

Ye Tian made a thunderous move, killing this eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse with one blow, causing the faces of the other eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses to change drastically.

"Let's do it!"

Thundered!!!!!

The battle broke out!

However, Ye Tian's strength was too strong.

He didn't keep his hand at all, the Golden Arm Kill combined with the two major killing moves of Aurora Dun, he could kill an eighteen-dimensional powerhouse in almost one move in seconds.

In a short period of time, these six eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses were killed.

Then, he stepped into the Hengyuan Gate.

At this time, the other eighteen-dimensional powerhouses inside the Hengyuan Gate were out of the customs, but when they saw Ye Tian's combat power to kill an eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse in one move, they were so frightened that they didn't dare to make a move.

"I'm just cultivating here, if you don't bother me, after a period of time, I will naturally leave!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"You can choose a mountain as a dojo for cultivation at will. "

The other eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses of the Hengyuan Gate confessed.

Immediately, Ye Tian picked a position of 0.1, and then began to cultivate with the help of the power of the Hengyuan Gate's divine dimension.

"It's so rich in the power of the Divine Dimension, it deserves to be one of the top treasures of the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth!"

Ye Tian smiled.

Immediately, he retreated here to practice penance, and with the help of the secret method of Tianwei, he absorbed a large amount of divine power to quickly refine his physical body.

His cultivation is getting higher and higher, and his aura is getting stronger and stronger.

Thousands of years later.

this day.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's physical fitness broke through and reached the realm of the eighteenth dimension.

At this time, the eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses of Hengyuan Gate also sensed Ye Tian's breakthrough, and they didn't dare to make a move against Ye Tian.

Ye Tian of the seventeenth dimension can kill the eighteenth dimension in seconds, and now after breaking through the eighteenth dimension, isn't it comparable to the ultimate powerhouse? .
